query:
-- Check if the "working" ChannelHaus services (with correct margins) have Xero billing items
-- Pick a few well-known ones: Banyo Village, Beenleigh, Control Equipment, Eatons Quality
SELECT 
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  bi.description as biDescription,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.billingPlatform,
  bi.invoiceNumber
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.customerName IN ('Banyo Village Medical Centre', 'Beenleigh Road Medical Practice', 'Control Equipment Pty Ltd', 'Eatons Quality Medical & Skin Cancer')
ORDER BY s.customerName, bi.lineAmount DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Check if the "working" ChannelHaus services (with correct margins) have Xero billing items
-- Pick a few well-known ones: Banyo Village, Beenleigh, Control Equipment, Eatons Quality
SELECT 
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  bi.description as biDescription,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.billingPlatform,
  bi.invoiceNumber
FROM services s
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.customerName IN ('Banyo Village Medical Centre', 'Beenleigh Road Medical Practice', 'Control Equipment Pty Ltd', 'Eatons Quality Medical & Skin Cancer')
ORDER BY s.customerName, bi.lineAmount DESC;
